notes: Authoritative production contract addresses for fact.market.

Individual MarketEscrow addresses are deployed per-market by the factories below; discover them via MarketFactory.getMarket(marketId) and MarketFactory.getMarketCount(), or by scanning the factory's outgoing deploys on tonscan.
gitTag and bytecodeHash will be populated on first tagged release (v1.0.0). Until then, verify bytecode by comparing tonscan's on-chain bytecode to a local build at HEAD.

verification.howToVerify: git checkout <gitTag>; pnpm install; pnpm build; sha256sum build/MarketFactory_MarketFactory.code.boc; compare to bytecodeHash above and to the on-chain bytecode shown on tonscan.
